title: 11 Soothing Teas to Help Teachers Recover from Strep Throat
description: Glycyrrhiza uralensis teas, also known as licorice root tea, have been used for centuries to help alleviate symptoms of strep throat. The tea contains compounds like glycyrrhizin, which has anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce swelling in the throat. It also contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antimicrobial properties that can help combat the bacteria that cause strep throat.
